title: Implement command_bead_history() handler and wire into dispatch
description: Add command_bead_history() to src/agent_takt/cli/commands/bead.py. Handler: (1) resolve bead ID via RepositoryStorage.resolve_bead_id(prefix); (2) load bead and extract execution_history; (3) apply --event filter with OR semantics when args.event is non-empty; (4) apply --limit N by keeping only the last N entries after event filtering; (5) if args.json emit filtered entries as a single JSON array via json.dumps to stdout; (6) otherwise call format_bead_history_plain(entries, plain=args.plain) and print. Wire the handler into the bead subcommand dispatch block alongside existing history-less commands. Export command_bead_history from commands/__init__.py if needed.
acceptance_criteria: takt bead history <id> prints one line per execution_history entry ascending by timestamp
takt bead history <id> --limit 2 prints only the last 2 entries
takt bead history <id> --event failed prints only entries with event==failed
takt bead history <id> --event failed --event retried prints entries matching either event (OR)
takt bead history <id> --json emits a JSON array equal to the full (post-filter) execution_history
Partial bead ID prefix resolves correctly via resolve_bead_id
